name: display-input-switcher
title: Display Input Switcher
description: Switches your monitor's input source using Raycast and m1ddc
author: clins1994

commands.name: switch-input-source
commands.title: Switch Input Source
commands.description: Switch the input source on a display

commands.name: preview-input-source
commands.title: Preview Input Source
commands.description: Preview an input source, reverts after a timeout

commands.name: toggle-input-source
commands.title: Toggle Input Source
commands.description: Toggle between current and previously selected input source

preferences.name: m1ddcPath
preferences.title: m1ddc Path
preferences.description: Path to m1ddc binary. Leave empty to auto-detect from Homebrew.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
